prompt: Cinematic, surreal yet photorealistic scene of a social gathering in a large open hall. A dense cluster of people surrounds a single central figure, all engaged and interacting closely with that person. Around the edges of the scene, several individuals stand in small, sparse interactions, each connected to only one or two others. The composition emphasizes that from the viewpoint of any peripheral individual, the people they are connected to appear more socially connected than they are. Subtle perspective distortion enhances this effect, making central figures appear disproportionately connected and influential. No text, no symbols, no diagrams, no numbers, no charts, no labels, no UI elements. No literal network graphs or node-link diagrams. Lighting is natural but slightly dramatic, with focus depth guiding attention toward the dense center while the edges feel comparatively isolated. The overall image should evoke a quiet sense of imbalance and contradiction — a feeling that social reality is uneven in a way that feels unintuitive but undeniable.
visual_logic: A dense central figure appears highly connected while peripheral individuals see others as more connected than themselves, reflecting how highly connected nodes dominate perceived social networks.
